name: True Gold Mining Inc.
description: True Gold Mining Inc. was a mineral exploration and development company focused on identifying and advancing gold projects with low-cost profiles, low technical risks, and solid economics. The company primarily operated in West Africa, notably in Burkina Faso, where it developed the Karma gold mine. True Gold Mining was committed to growing a profitable gold production business through its experienced management and technical teams. In 2016, the company was acquired by Endeavour Mining Corporation, a transaction that positioned the combined entity as a significant gold producer in the West African region.
